content.text: Raise the container CPU and memory limits in the deployment manifest.

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: worker
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "128Mi"

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: deploy/worker.yaml
@@ resources:
           limits:
-            cpu: "500m"
-            memory: "256Mi"
+            cpu: "1000m"
+            memory: "512Mi"
           requests:
             cpu: "250m"
             memory: "128Mi"
*** End Patch

content.content:
Successfully applied patch to the following files:
deploy/worker.yaml
